memory_entries.text: In the recurring SQLite product-review benchmark, groups map as g1=office products, g2=electronics, g3=musical instruments. Review tables are fdbk_g1/fdbk_g2/fdbk_g3 with uid reviewer IDs; item metadata tables are items_g*; taxonomy tables only for g1/g2. For cross-dataset top-level category span questions, treat each dataset group as a top-level category and count distinct groups per uid.
